titleStmt.title: SII 27.388: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 388. (A.R. No. 339 of 1930-31.) SĪMANTŪRU, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Two sides of a slab set up in the Janārdanasvāmi temple.
This badly damaged record refers to an agreement between two parties defining their rights on the land etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
damaged
śeya koṭiyaṁṇa seṭṭiyarāda bāca heggeḍeyaru Avara taṁma harihara se
ṭṭiyarige Avara Aḷiya kēsaṁṇaheggeḍe Avarasaṁtāna pāraṁpareyade hi ḍi ke
yalu bāḷuva ballāḷugaḷige koṭṭa dharmmasādhanagaḷige barasida śilāśāsanada
kramaveṁteṁdare yiṁnaḍe Agaḷiṁda paḍuvalu beṁgareya kere pariyaṁtara bhāja
vāḍiya hoḷeyiṁda baḍagalu paṭṭaṇadahoḷe pariyaṁtara Uḷḷa bāḷuja
nana labaṁṭara ṭiyalu baḷage baṁdu hoṟage Anyaru Arasu Amasarige
ḷa battubaṁdare buddiyiṁda nirisi bidireyalu bāḷisi koḍuveU Anu dadiddare na
mma yittaṁḍaramaṁdige yirisuva vobbarige koḍuva Aṁdinakaṭṭu maṁnisuva maṁna
ṇe muṁtādavanu naṁma kayiṁda vecisi nāu lēsuholle hoga ḷi Anubha
visi bāḷisi koḍuveU yi Āḍakakkenāu tappeU tappidarevāraṇāsiyali sō
masūryagrahaṇadali sahasrakapiligaḷa vadista dōṣa naṁma mātāpitrugaḷa vadhi
sta dōpa himasētu madyadali Uḷaliṁgagaḷakitta dōṣa nāu tappidare nīu yellāru
Ayakaḷadalli bāḷuva karttarakoḍe yeraḍu sthānadalli yittāṁḍada lāsarisavara
mūḍesoppahiḍadu niṁma huyyalanu hēḷibaṁda śilāśāsanada modalaṭā
niṁmalli Oṁduheṁṇu gaṁḍanū hāyikki Aḷidare yeraḍupakṣadalū �yoranida
śilāśāsanada Aḍakakke tappiheṁṇugaṁḍanū nūki Aṁḷidareṁdu tapida ka
rttara hoyyala hēḷodu yeṁdu koṭṭakaṭṭu sādana yellūra dēvarāhāḍeya
rāda kuṁdaheggaḍeyarige Avara taṁmma śaṁkara hāḍeyaru muṁtāda saṁtānada pa
raṁpareya yellūra ballāḷugaḷige Ayakaḷadalā kiṁnika sēvitarāda kiṁnikahega Some more lines below this reverse is continued for convenience.

yallūra Ayakaḷadalu bāḷuva ballāḷugaḷige
ṁnika heggaḍeyaru Avaratamma harihara seṭṭiyaru Avara Aḷi
ya kēsaṁṇa heggaḍeyaru muṁtāda saṁtāna pāraṁpareyalu
bāḷuva ballāḷugaḷu taṁmūḷēkastharāgi voḍaṁbaṭṭu
śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare yellūra Ayakaḷada bāḷu
dagaḷige baḷagebaṁdu hoṟage Anyaru Arasu Anusarigaḷiṁda gaḷu
rādeḍe koṭṭa ṭhāvinalu naṁma maṁdige yirisuva nyarige koḍuva
suva maṁnaṇenu davanu naṁva kayiṁda vecisi ba dani yellūra Ayakaḷa
dēvarige nerada haṇau naṁma Aṟu nāḍavaru kuḍuki kōṭikaṭṭi ya
ḍi Anubha�
naṁma rādare nāu nivaga bidireyalu ne
dranāyava māḍikoṁḍu kāduvaretappeUyi Arddhake nāu tappidarevāraṇā
siyalū sōma sūryagrahaṇadali sahasra kapileya nāu vadhista dō ṣa hi
ma sētumadhyadali Uḷaliṁgagaḷa nāu kitta dōṣa naṁma yippatta Oṁdukale
ya pitrugaḷanu nāu narakadali hā(yi) kidadōṣa yi dōṣagaḷige nāu
Oḷagāgi baradu śilāśāsanada kaṭṭige tappidare yellūru Ayakaḷadalū bāḷuva karta
ru bidireya bāḷu janadalū mānatappidare Ātana tegadu Aḷiyana kuḷḷirisiba
rada kaṭṭige nirisi bāḷisi koḍuUdu Aṁṇa tappidare taṁmana kuḷirisi bāḷisi koḍōdu
yo Aḍakakke tappeveṁdu barasida śilāśāsana yiṁtappudakke sākṣagaḷu ye
llūra sōmanāthadēvaru simaṁttūra janārdanadēvaru bidireya gaṇā
dhipati kāṁtīśvara dēvara baḷinīru . rāmāya rāma bhadrāya rāmacaṁdrā
ya vētasē raghunāthāya nāthāya sītāyāḥ patayē namaḥ
Digital edition of SII 27.388 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
